scripts.preinstall: node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'')) { console.error('Please use pnpm instead of npm/yarn'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/lecker run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
